response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified Yuzuki Choco and `#癒月ちょこ生誕祭2026` from on-screen text. 
2. Song 1 detected: Character performance matched with 'Kokuhaku Biyori, desu!' (Love Live!). Search: 'Kokuhaku Biyori, desu! Love Live Japanese and English lyrics'. 
3. Song 2 detected: On-screen title '世界は恋に落ちている' (HoneyWorks). Search: 'Sekai wa Koi ni Ochiteiru HoneyWorks Japanese and English lyrics'.
4. Created scenes based on transition at 02:31-02:35.
response.global_summary: The video captures a live virtual concert performance by Yuzuki Choco and a guest, featuring a two-song setlist: 'Kokuhaku Biyori, desu!' and 'Sekai wa Koi ni Ochiteiru'. There is a brief transition between the two songs.

scenes.description: Performance of 'Kokuhaku Biyori, desu!'. Yuzuki Choco and guest perform on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Zutto mae kara unto mae kara
Kiite mitakute matteta
Watashi kara saisho ni tsutaete shimae
'Daisuki desu!'

Zutto mae kara unto mae kara
Kiite mitakute matteta
Watashi kara saisho ni tsutaete shimae
'Daisuki desu!'
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I've been wanting to ask you, and I've been waiting for a long time
I'll be the first to tell you from me, 'I love you!'

I've been wanting to ask you, and I've been waiting for a long time
I've been wanting to hear it, and I've been waiting for a long time
I'll be the first to tell you from me, 'I love you!'

scenes.description: Transition scene with a curtain closing and opening, separating the two musical performances.
Performance of 'Sekai wa Koi ni Ochiteiru'. Yuzuki Choco and guest continue the performance.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Sekai wa koi ni ochiteiru
Hikari no ya mune wo sasu
Kimi wo wakaritain da yo
'Nee, oshiete'

Surechigau kotoba ni chotto dake no koukai
Namida koborete
Isogashi kanjou kodou ni rinku suru
Chuuningu tashikametain da

Zenbu wakaritain da yo
'Nee, kikasete'
Taguri yosete mou zero-senchi
Kakenuketa hibi ni
Wasurenai wasurerarenai
Kagayaku ichi peeji
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The world is falling in love
An arrow of light pierces my chest
I want to understand you
'Hey, tell me'

A little regret in passing words
Tears spill out
I want to confirm the tuning linked to my busy heartbeat

I want to find out everything
'Hey, let me hear it'
Drawing it closer, zero centimeters away
I can't forget, I can't forget
The one shining page of the days we ran through
